---
title: "Project Proposal"
format: html
---

## 1. Project Outline

(summarize the topic of the project)

## 2. Member

\[name\] \[email\]

\[name\] \[email\]

Shohei Kobayashi (kobayashishohei1023\@gmail.com)

## 3. GitHub Repogitry

<https://github.com/Youta-droid/Stat_Project>

## 4. Dataset

Source: <https://www.worldhappiness.report/>

Let's take a look into the dataset (for example 2025):

```         
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(here)
df <- read_excel("world_hapiness_datasets/WHR25_Data_Figure_2.1v3.xlsx")
df
```
